rtl:
module seq_detect_1011(input clk,input rst_n,input x,output reg y);
 reg [2:0] s; localparam S0=0,S1=1,S2=2,S3=3;
 always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
  if(!rst_n) begin s<=S0; y<=0; end
  else begin
   case(s)
    S0: begin y<=0; s<= x?S1:S0; end
    S1: begin y<=0; s<= x?S1:S2; end
    S2: begin y<=0; s<= x?S3:S0; end
    S3: begin if(x) begin y<=1; s<=S1; end else begin y<=0; s<=S2; end end
    default: begin y<=0; s<=S0; end
   endcase
  end
 end
endmodule
spec: An overlapping sequence detector for the pattern 1011 on a serial input; assert the output when the pattern completes.

rtl:
module uart_tx(input clk,input rst_n,input start,input [7:0] data,output reg tx,output reg busy);
 localparam IDLE=0,STRT=1,DATA=2,STOP=3;
 reg [1:0] st; reg [3:0] idx; reg [7:0] sh;
 always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
  if(!rst_n) begin st<=IDLE; tx<=1'b1; busy<=1'b0; idx<=0; sh<=0; end
  else case(st)
   IDLE: begin tx<=1'b1; busy<=1'b0; idx<=0; if(start) begin sh<=data; busy<=1'b1; st<=STRT; end end
   STRT: begin tx<=1'b0; idx<=0; st<=DATA; end
   DATA: begin tx<=sh[idx]; if(idx==7) st<=STOP; else idx<=idx+1; end
   STOP: begin tx<=1'b1; busy<=1'b0; st<=IDLE; end
   default: begin st<=IDLE; tx<=1'b1; end
  endcase
 end
endmodule
spec: A UART transmitter: send a start bit (0), 8 data bits LSB-first, then a stop bit (1), one clock per bit.
A UART transmitter: send a start bit (0), 8 data bits LSB-first, then a stop bit (1), one clock per bit.

rtl:
module uart_tx(input clk,input rst_n,input start,input [7:0] data,output reg tx,output reg busy);
 localparam IDLE=0,STRT=1,DATA=2,STOP=3;
 reg [1:0] st; reg [3:0] idx; reg [7:0] sh;
 always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
  if(!rst_n) begin st<=IDLE; tx<=1'b1; busy<=1'b0; idx<=0; sh<=0; end
  else case(st)
   IDLE: begin tx<=1'b1; busy<=1'b0; idx<=0; if(start) begin sh<=data; busy<=1'b1; st<=STRT; end end
   STRT: begin tx<=1'b0; idx<=0; st<=DATA; end
   DATA: begin tx<=sh[7-idx]; if(idx==7) st<=STOP; else idx<=idx+1; end
   STOP: begin tx<=1'b1; busy<=1'b0; st<=IDLE; end
   default: begin st<=IDLE; tx<=1'b1; end
  endcase
 end
endmodule
spec: A UART transmitter: send a start bit (0), 8 data bits LSB-first, then a stop bit (1), one clock per bit.

rtl:
module uart_tx(input clk,input rst_n,input start,input [7:0] data,output reg tx,output reg busy);
 localparam IDLE=0,STRT=1,DATA=2,STOP=3;
 reg [1:0] st; reg [3:0] idx; reg [7:0] sh;
 always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
  if(!rst_n) begin st<=IDLE; tx<=1'b1; busy<=1'b0; idx<=0; sh<=0; end
  else case(st)
   IDLE: begin tx<=1'b1; busy<=1'b0; idx<=0; if(start) begin sh<=data; busy<=1'b1; st<=STRT; end end
   STRT: begin tx<=1'b0; idx<=0; st<=DATA; end
   DATA: begin tx<=sh[idx]; if(idx==7) st<=STOP; else idx<=idx-1; end
   STOP: begin tx<=1'b1; busy<=1'b0; st<=IDLE; end
   default: begin st<=IDLE; tx<=1'b1; end
  endcase
 end
endmodule
spec: A UART transmitter: send a start bit (0), 8 data bits LSB-first, then a stop bit (1), one clock per bit.

rtl:
module uart_tx(input clk,input rst_n,input start,input [7:0] data,output reg tx,output reg busy);
 localparam IDLE=0,STRT=1,DATA=2,STOP=3;
 reg [1:0] st; reg [3:0] idx; reg [7:0] sh;
 always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
  if(!rst_n) begin st<=IDLE; tx<=1'b2; busy<=1'b0; idx<=0; sh<=0; end
  else case(st)
   IDLE: begin tx<=1'b1; busy<=1'b0; idx<=0; if(start) begin sh<=data; busy<=1'b1; st<=STRT; end end
   STRT: begin tx<=1'b0; idx<=0; st<=DATA; end
   DATA: begin tx<=sh[idx]; if(idx==7) st<=STOP; else idx<=idx+1; end
   STOP: begin tx<=1'b1; busy<=1'b0; st<=IDLE; end
   default: begin st<=IDLE; tx<=1'b1; end
  endcase
 end
endmodule
spec: A UART transmitter: send a start bit (0), 8 data bits LSB-first, then a stop bit (1), one clock per bit.

rtl:
module vending_change(input clk,input rst_n,input [1:0] coin,
                     output reg dispense,output reg [3:0] change);
 reg [5:0] acc; reg [5:0] add;
 always @(*) begin case(coin) 2'd1: add=5; 2'd2: add=10; default: add=0; endcase end
 always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
  if(!rst_n) begin acc<=0; dispense<=0; change<=0; end
  else begin
   if(acc+add>=20) begin dispense<=1; change<=(acc+add)-20; acc<=0; end
   else begin dispense<=0; change<=0; acc<=acc+add; end
  end
 end
endmodule
spec: A vending FSM accumulating nickels/dimes to a price of 20, dispensing and returning change when reached.

rtl: module lfsr4(input clk, input rst_n, output reg [3:0] q); always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) if(!rst_n) q<=4'b0001; else q<= {q[2:0], q[3]^q[2]}; endmodule
spec: A maximal-length 4-bit LFSR with taps x^4+x^3+1; never enters the all-zero state.

rtl: module edge_det(input clk, input rst_n, input sig, output reg pulse); reg prev; always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) if(!rst_n) begin prev<=1'b0; pulse<=1'b0; end else begin pulse<= sig & ~prev; prev<= sig; end endmodule
spec: A registered rising-edge detector: output a one-cycle pulse the cycle after the input rises.

rtl: module ring_cnt(input clk, input rst_n, output reg [3:0] q); always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) if(!rst_n) q<=4'b0001; else q<= {q[2:0], q[3]}; endmodule
spec: A one-hot ring counter that rotates a single set bit each clock.

rtl: module johnson_cnt(input clk, input rst_n, output reg [3:0] q); always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) if(!rst_n) q<=4'b0000; else q<= {q[2:0], ~q[3]}; endmodule
spec: A Johnson (twisted-ring) counter using inverted feedback of the last stage.

rtl: module gray_cnt(input clk, input rst_n, output reg [3:0] g); reg [3:0] bin; always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) if(!rst_n) begin bin<=4'd0; g<=4'd0; end else begin bin<=bin+4'd1; g<= (bin+4'd1) ^ ((bin+4'd1)>>1); end endmodule
spec: A 4-bit Gray-code counter (one-bit change per step).
